violations.text: Inspector observed ROP salmon and tilapia thawing with package still intact. Fish that was observed in temperature was taken out of package to finish thawing process. Fish that was tempted at 42DF was voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2025

The door to the outside, located in the (back restroom area ), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2025
(Walk in Freezer ) located in the (kitchen ) area was not in good repair.Observed an accumulation of ice buildup. New Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the (blender base ) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2025

The floors in kitchen area have an accumulation of soil residue, food debris, and/or small accumulation of rodent droppings The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (meat grinder) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC disassembled for cleaning and sanitizing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024
Inspector observed ROP fish thawing in walk-in with package intact. PIC informed, cut package open during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024

The floor and walls in the dry storage area have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. Inspector observed an accumulation of debris in floor drains. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024

The walls in the dry storage area are in poor repair. Inspector observed a hole in rear corner wall and at the threshold to the area. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2024
